• Offers selectable response styles: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, roast
  • Features shaking animation and Three.js WebGL particle effects
  • Fetches AI answers via OpenRouter API using user questions
    particles.rotation.y += baseRotationSpeed;
    responseText.textContent = text;

This interactive Magic 8 Ball app allows users to submit questions and choose response personalities. It uses Three.js for animated WebGL particle effects and triggers a shaking animation during queries. AI-generated answers are retrieved via the OpenRouter API with style-specific system prompts.
